Title: Route Guard — Enable=false blocks /loyalty-catalog (404)
Preconditions:
[PRE:CLEAR_SESSION]
Loyalty settings for store {{STORE_ID}}: Enable=false (any Mode; any Currency). Settings pre-configured via LOY-019/LOY-022 pattern.
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/loyalty-catalog
[WAIT] page load completes
Assertions:
[NAV] URL does NOT stay at /loyalty-catalog — either remains with 404 UI OR redirected to not-found page
[DOM] page shows 'not found' content or 404-equivalent UI; NOT loyalty catalog product grid

[CONSOLE] no unhandled JS errors
Failure_Signals: Spinner visible >5s; products grid renders (guard bypass)
Cleanup: Restore Enable=true via PUT {{BACK_URL}}/api/loyalty-setting if modified

Title: Mixed Cart — unselect ALL items in /cart Order Summary: every total row (Subtotal/Discount/Tax/Shipping/Grand Total + Total in PTS) must display 0.00 — REGRESSION GUARD
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:LOYALTY_VIP_USER]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
Loyalty settings: Enable=true; Mode=Mixed Cart; Currency=@td(LOYALTY_SETTINGS.currency_code) (PTS). Default store currency {{CURRENCY_CODE}} (USD). Theme with Mixed Cart support (vc-theme-b2b-vue-2.51.0-pr-2310+).

GROUND TRUTH (verified 2026-06-10):
  After unselect-all with a shipping method selected:
  - Subtotal/Discount/Shipping rows correctly display $0.00.
  - Grand Total row displays $180 (FAILS today — binds to buggy cartTotals[] USD bucket total=180).
  - Tax row displays +$30 (FAILS today — binds to cartTotals[] taxTotal=30).
  - Total in PTS block correctly displays 0 PTS.
This case asserts the FIXED behavior: ALL rows including Grand Total and Tax = 0.00 after unselect-all. WILL FAIL today on Grand Total + Tax rows until the cartTotals[] backend projection is selection-gated. Related JIRA: VCST-5238 (Apollo currencyCode MissingFieldError — a separate frontend defect not targeted by this case).
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/loyalty-catalog
[WAIT] product grid loaded with at least 1 product card
[ACT] click the '+' (Add to Cart) button on the first product card to add a PTS loyalty product
[WAIT] cart badge increments OR toast 'Item added' appears
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/catalog
[WAIT] standard catalog product grid loaded with at least 1 product card

Assertions:
[DOM] Order Summary Subtotal row displays $0.00 (or 0.00 {{CURRENCY_CODE}})
[DOM] Order Summary Discount row displays $0.00 or is absent/hidden (no discounts on deselected cart)
[DOM] Order Summary Tax row displays $0.00 or +$0.00 — NOT +$30 or any non-zero value
[DOM] Order Summary Shipping row displays $0.00
[DOM] Order Summary Grand Total row displays $0.00 — NOT $180 or any non-zero value (THIS FAILS TODAY)
[DOM] 'Total in @td(LOYALTY_SETTINGS.currency_code)' block in Order Summary displays 0 @td(LOYALTY_SETTINGS.currency_code) (PTS block correctly zeroed)

Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] After unselect-all, cart() GraphQL query should return cartTotals[?isDefaultTotalCurrency=true].total.amount = 0 (currently 180 — active backend bug). Frontend Grand Total and Tax bind to this bucket; they display non-zero because the backend does not zero the projection. This case fails at the DOM level (Grand Total = $180, Tax = +$30) because of the backend defect — the frontend is correctly reflecting what the API returns. [BACKEND] See GQL-MC-012 in 050b4 for the runner-native backend guard encoding the same invariant at the xAPI level.
[CONSOLE] After unselect-all, VCST-5238 ApolloError currencyCode MissingFieldError may appear in console on any cart mutation — this is a SEPARATE known defect; do NOT fail this case for that error alone. Fail only if the totals DOM assertions above fail.
Failure_Signals: Grand Total row shows $180 after unselect-all (active bug — EXPECTED FAIL until cartTotals[] backend fix); Tax row shows +$30 after unselect-all (same root cause); Subtotal/Shipping rows show non-zero values after unselect-all (separate regression if this breaks); Total in PTS block shows non-zero PTS after unselect-all (PTS bucket regression); Cart page shows error/spinner >10s after unselect-all; No delivery method options available (BLOCKED — check store shipping config)
Cleanup: Remove all items from cart via the cart UI (remove buttons or clear-cart if available). Sign out.
References: VCST-5101; VCST-5238 (Apollo currencyCode MissingFieldError — separate frontend defect, do not conflate); GQL-MC-012 in regression/suites/Backend/graphql/050b4-graphql-xcart-cross-domain.csv (backend runner-native guard for the same invariant); BL-CART-010; BL-LOY-001; BL-LOY-003
